horoscope: Today's Full Moon can bring a project to completion, dear Aries. It can also signal an important realization about how the attitudes you bring to the world affect your life path. There might be a sudden desire to depart from your usual routine, go on a trip, or do something more refreshing, meaningful, and life-affirming. It can be about receiving news, launching a publishing project, legal matters, education, or travel. Whatever emerges now sets you along a new path regarding your beliefs and attitudes. A great idea may come to you, or one in the works fleshes out now. The desire to embark on a new path on a mental level is strong. Aim to get things into order as much as possible so that you can free yourself up for opportunities. You can have some stimulating and healing conversations now. Today’s transits positively influence your interactions, encouraging healthy and effortless communication. You have a knack for expressing support, both directly and indirectly, and people are drawn to your communication style.

Today's Full Moon can pull out strong feelings from you and can stir a revelation or epiphany, dear Taurus. Occurring in your intimacy and sharing sector, this can be about the need for someone or for support, whether this is emotional, moral, or financial. The balance of power in a relationship, debts, a partner's income, or other shared resources can be in strong focus. It can also be about attachments to habits or situations, as you may be seeing the light about releasing yourself from a burden. While discoveries made now are powerful, they're also bound to be larger than life, so aim to act on things later, after giving them some thought. Today's transits are remarkable for enhanced problem-solving ability regarding work, financial, and practical or mechanical matters. You find it exceptionally easy to come to agreements, which can boost your confidence and make you feel more capable. It’s also an excellent time to learn something that helps you heal and move on. A good part of your appeal now is that you’re open and relatable.

Today's Full Moon occurs in your partnership sector, dear Gemini, and previously undiscovered emotions or relationship issues may come to light. There could be a culmination of a personal project, or it could be more simply about something that has been brewing inside you, now reaching a personal epiphany. There can be a test of a partnership, but also an opportunity to connect more fully to your feelings and/or a special someone. If you allow yourself to observe what's happening, you may be able to come to a new understanding in a close personal relationship, both of yourself and someone special. Your relationship goals may also become clearer. Today's Mercury-Chiron transit finds you generous with your time and energy, and your ability to solve problems, particularly for others, is enhanced. Communication, learning, and transportation are in favor today, and emotional bonds with others can be strengthened through sincere words or gestures. You’re in your own terms and better positioned to make important changes or steer your life in positive directions. You might prefer to take the lead regarding mental or intellectual tasks and make executive decisions.

With the Full Moon this morning, dear Cancer, you're likely to have some important and seemingly sudden insight into the past. How to put some aspects of your past behind you, those that are holding you back from personal growth, can become pressing now. Health and work matters can be in high focus, and if you've been dissatisfied with work, health, or service matters, you're now feeling this frustration in a rush with the Full Moon illuminating your service sectors. Positively, you can be super-motivated to make changes to your routine that will help you feel better about yourself. There may be a need to be of service to others, and while there can be some difficulties juggling your responsibilities, you'll ultimately feel better about helping out. Try not to worry about whether you're appreciated. Instead, answer to yourself. Do what makes you feel good from the inside out. While this can be a time when you're scurrying around trying to manage your daily affairs or meet deadlines, it's a strong time to recognize the need to take better care of yourself and your routines. Opportunities can emerge to heal or help others and deal with complicated emotions. Writing, teaching, and communicating your ideas could be prominent as Mercury and Chiron harmonize.

Today's Full Moon occurs in your creativity, joy, and romance sector, dear Leo, and it can illuminate issues surrounding friends, romance, and personal goals. There can be an epiphany, a turning point, or final word on a matter. Listen to your heart, as you're likely to discover your feelings about someone or a pet project. Ultimately, this will help you to make meaningful decisions. Some aspects of your past need to be laid to rest simply because they are no longer serving you well, and doing so can eventually pave the way to a new beginning. Do keep in mind that information received or perceived right now may be emotionally biased, which means it's relevant, but you'd probably do better to wait for the dust to settle before making final decisions. You’re quick to get serious and intimate today. Activities or ideas shared with friends, networks, or groups can be uniquely healing and helpful. Or, you enjoy a stronger sense of community or friendship, and a relationship can be nurtured with a spirit of openness and acceptance. Today's Mercury-Chiron transit helps you see the bigger picture on a matter, and it can mean filling in some of the blanks.

Today's Full Moon turns your attention to matters of home, family, and the heart, dear Virgo. If you've poured much energy into your responsibilities to the outside world, circumstances now remind you to find a balance. The need for rest, familiarity, safety, and security is powerful now. This Full Moon can stir up revelations, and this allows you to deal with whatever comes into full view head-on. Wait for things to calm down before taking action, but pay particular attention to the issues that emerge now. If you've been overextending yourself, you need to find ways to get more rest, or you may need to catch up on family or household work. It's a time for boosting your relationships with those you love or with people you live with. Today’s transits also support improving your reputation and bonding with others who share similar goals and visions. You’re in fine shape for understanding a situation or problem and gaining perspective.

With today's Full Moon in your communication sector, dear Libra, observe what bubbles up to the surface, as what's said or not said can quickly become important. A culmination of a writing or learning project can occur now, or there may be immediate needs to address transportation or communication issues. This Full Moon is favorable for personal interests and projects, publicity, or promotion, although too-quick moves can backfire around most Full Moons. It's best to process whatever feelings or information arise, then make meaningful changes afterward. Even so, it's an exciting time of illumination, an epiphany, or a culmination. There can be a lot of information to take in right now, and taking your time with it makes sense.

You may be doing a lot of observing and planning, dear Scorpio, and you're inclined to pour quite a bit of energy into engrossing projects and interests these days. Today's Full Moon can stir emotions or create excitement, particularly around money, possessions, and sharing. It can shed light on a financial matter or on issues surrounding your belongings, valuables, talents, and resources. There can be a turning point in a close relationship, with money, or business, or a revelation that leads to new and important ideas. A wake-up call surrounding managing your money and personal resources is much appreciated and useful now. This lunation falls along an axis that also concerns talents, resources, and intimate relationships, so that new feelings or discoveries may revolve around these areas. Today, the lines of communication are open, and others are both flexible and cooperative with you. You might be pleasantly surprised by someone’s show of support.

The Full Moon this morning occurs in your sign, dear Sagittarius, and it brings increased activity and attention your way, as well as sudden emotions to your life. An epiphany can happen now that changes your focus and renews your spirit. If you've been focusing so much on others that you've ignored your needs in the process, you can experience a burst of independence and self-interest now. Pay close attention to what emerges today, and listen to your heart! A relationship matter might suddenly reveal itself. Emotions that surface can point you to areas of your life that need more tender loving care. Take things in rather than act upon emotions for now, as realizations are new and a bit raw. Look for ways to regain balance between independence and togetherness.

Today's Full Moon occurs in the sign just behind yours, dear Capricorn, prompting the need for extra time alone or rest, recuperation, and regeneration. This is wonderfully timed, as you can benefit from some introspection and the chance to center yourself after busy weeks. Work, health, or caregiving matters may come to light now. There can be unusual coincidences or unexpected discoveries of your feelings about a person or project now. Your intuition is powerful. This can also be a time when you recognize the need to heal, unwind, and relax. You can experience significant dreams or intuitive flashes. If you've been ignoring your need for downtime, imagination, or rest, this lunation reminds you to attend to your emotional health. You may be considering special ways to improve your health and wellness, assist others, or devote extra time to pet projects.

Today's Full Moon can shed light on your hopes and wishes, dear Aquarius, and perhaps some dissatisfaction. Friends and lovers can be part of the picture or catalysts for the feelings you have. You are opening your eyes to areas of your life that are not working to your benefit, and if so, it's a good time to begin making plans on how to change them. This Full Moon can bring people to you, or it can stir up a lot of activity in your social life. It can also motivate you to get moving on a new plan or project that's fresh and exciting. Inner stirrings prompt you into action, although it's always wise to take in before acting out around a Full Moon. There can be the illumination of a friendship or romantic matter, or your feelings can become hard to ignore now, even if you've been keeping them at bay! This can be a time of invites or a sudden demand for your help, support, or company. A pleasant feeling of being needed and needing others can be in the picture. The theme now is recognizing your need for others. Good energy is with you for mending fences and enjoying others. It’s an excellent time to be honest with yourself about how you feel.

Today's Full Moon pulls your strong attention to your performance, career, reputation, or responsibilities, dear Pisces. You've been particularly inward-focused or absorbed in your personal life these days, and you're now in higher demand. It can also be an opportunity to shine. You might experience enough tension between your personal and professional life that compels you to make changes. This is a good thing, but do keep in mind that emotions and conclusions can be exaggerated around any Full Moon. For the best result, center yourself and process revelations before taking action. While it may have seemed recently that circumstances or people were slowing you down, you may now have the opportunity to strut your stuff, as conditions are such that you are in a position to show your more mature and responsible side. There may be recognition, an award, or a job opportunity. A well-rounded approach to communicating is especially effective today. In fact, your good intentions shine through in your words. This is also a good time to feel a connection with someone special, and there can be a nice sense of growth and faith in a relationship.
